subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim of musk-laden breath, that which thou didst pen unto the noble Khan hath been perused. Thou hast spoken and composed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مشکین نفس آنچه بجناب خان نگاشتی ملاحظه شد سخن گفتی و در سفتی و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @growth of the Cause, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @Manifestation of God as educator
